title: Shear Item Frames Continued
description: This mod allows you to shear (and wax) item frames!
body:
# Shear Item Frames Continued

This mod is a continuation and expansion of the [Shear Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/shear-item-frames) by [sydist](https://modrinth.com/user/sydist). As the original author dropped the mod and never updated it again I decided to do it myself.

The mod allows you to shear (and wax) item frames!

Shearing an item frame makes it invisible, only showing the item which allows for some cool decoration.  

Waxing the item frame stops players from rotating it and allows opening containers through them.

---

## Authors

- original code by **sydist**
- modifications and updates by **magor2345**
